title: Aesthetic Surgical Images
description: Aesthetic Surgical Images, a plastic surgery practice based in Omaha, NE, has been serving patients since 1968 and is known for its commitment to quality and integrity. The practice's medical records are managed by Morgan Records Management, which ensures compliance with state and federal laws regarding record retention and confidentiality. Patients can request their medical records through the practice's website, with a focus on providing a secure and efficient experience. Aesthetic Surgical Images aims to educate patients about their records and the importance of proper management.
